steps.title: Identify what initially measured means
steps.content: The phrase initially measured refers to the starting point in time. Since $x$ represents hours after the initial measurement, the initial time corresponds to $x = 0$.

steps.title: Substitute x = 0 into the equation
steps.content: When $x=0$, the model gives $$y=3600(a)^0.$$ By the zero exponent rule, $a^0=1$ for any nonzero base $a$. Therefore $$y=3600\cdot1=3600.$$ The predicted initial number of bacteria was 3600.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: No graph is needed here: for an exponential model, the initial value is the value at $x=0$. That value is the coefficient $3600$, so the answer is 3600.
